description: Executed TASK-NEXT-FROM-BASELINE-0001 dual-approval audit authority lock implementation. Created governance/audit-authority-lock.md on main branch establishing comprehensive dual-approval governance system: (1) Pre-action approval requirement mandating AUDITOR PRE_ACTION_APPROVED status before any development execution task initiation; (2) Post-action verification requirement enforcing AUDITOR VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED status for all ACTION_COMPLETED events; (3) Development execution lock preventing direct code changes without audit authority chain; (4) Approval authority matrix defining AUDITOR exclusive rights for PRE_ACTION_APPROVED and VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED issuance; (5) Violation detection and system halt protocols for unauthorized development execution attempts. Dual-approval system ensures complete audit authority over development lifecycle while maintaining autonomous operation flow through proper AUDITOR authorization channels.
